responsibilities: Design and ship end-to-end AI-powered features from prototype through production deployment and iteration
Build full-stack applications that integrate large language models into intuitive, user-facing product experiences
Rapidly prototype new AI capabilities to validate product hypotheses with real users and stakeholders
Collaborate closely with designers and product managers to translate user needs into AI-driven workflows
Engineer and optimize prompts and RAG pipelines that power core AI product functionality
Implement analytics and instrumentation to measure user engagement and effectiveness of AI features
Iterate quickly on product features based on user feedback, usage data, and experimentation results
